description.lat: The initial center latitude of the map (number)
description.lng: The initial center longitude of the map (number)
description.markers: An array of objects containing lat (number), lng (number), content (string, can be displayed in a popup) icon (string, based on the icon component names) color (string, hex or color name)
description.mapStyle: Theming of the map (pale, dark, color, default)
description.zoom: The initial zoom level of the map (number)
description.height: A css height value including unit (px, vh, %)
description.provider: The map provider to use (openstreetmap, googlemaps)
